summary: The Docker build failed because a RUN step that wget'ed the nydus binary from GitHub returned a 502 Bad Gateway and exited with code 1, causing buildx bake to fail.
root_cause: A wget invocation failed with 'HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error' when downloading nydus-static v2.4.0 from GitHub, and the RUN command exited with code 1 which aborted the build.

evidence.reason: Shows the exact build step executing wget to download the nydus release.

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Demonstrates the network/remote-server error returned by wget (502 Bad Gateway).

evidence.quote: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: Confirms the wget failure caused the Docker build to fail with a non-zero exit code.
Identifies the Dockerfile line where the failing RUN command is located.

evidence.quote: ##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: CI-level failure message showing buildx bake aborted due to the wget failure.

suggested_fix: Retry the workflow (transient network/remote-server errors often resolve). If it continues failing, make the Dockerfile step more resilient (add retries/timeouts), provide a cached/fallback copy of the nydus binary, or update the download source/URL to a reachable location.
